## Week in Review: 2026-04-27 to 2026-05-03

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 10.6.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.9 (0.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.26)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 10.6 (+37.0% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
